name: Brett Walker // Savior?
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Living in a zombie apocalypse wasn’t easy, especially when you lost one of your legs.

No worries, Brett is here to take care of you! Even if he’s the one who took your leg..

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

I forgot from what exactly this is inspired. I have like the exact image and story in my head but I just forgot what it’s called. Surely there’s someone who knows what it is.

To be completely honest, he was originally meant to be like way crazier. More keeping you as a prisoner but I listened to the wrong song I think and I ended making him a softie.. oops. I got something else planned for the crazy dude tho

I might make a mini series or maybe an open collab kind of thing with the whole zombie apocalypse. I really like these kinds of scenarios, can you tell? 💔

Praying there’s no mistakes cause I will crash out if there is

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

He’s a bit crazy but he means well..

Discord server

Kofi
